languages.text: Мне довелось повидать немало схваток, но подобной той, что разгорелась на орбите проклятого мертвого мира, я еще не лицезрел. Немногочисленные истребители, прикрывающие флагманский корабль, вели неравный бой со все прибывающими полчищами нечестивого врага. Жертвуя собой, слуги династии фон Валанциус открывали путь своему господину, как и встарь.

traits.locale_text: Офицеры и пилоты, ведомые общим порывом, демонстрировали чудеса мастерства. Флот династии фон Валанциус, прикрывающий флагманский корабль, вел неравный бой со все прибывающими полчищами нечестивого врага. В этом и заключался смысл всей операции — жертвуя собой, слуги династии фон Валанциус открывали путь своему господину, как и встарь.

languages.text: I have seen my fair share of battles, but never before have I witnessed anything like that which erupted in the orbit of that accursed dead world. The handful of fighter craft covering the flagship fought an outmatched battle with the unholy enemy's ever-swelling hordes. Yet, sacrificing themselves, the servants of House von Valancius cleared the way for their master, just as they did in days of old.
languages.original_text: Мне довелось повидать немало схваток, но подобной той, что разгорелась на орбите проклятого мертвого мира, я еще не лицезрел. Немногочисленные истребители, прикрывающие флагманский корабль, вели неравный бой со все прибывающими полчищами нечестивого врага. Жертвуя собой, слуги династии фон Валанциус открывали путь своему господину, как и встарь.

traits.locale_text: I have seen my fair share of battles, but never before have I witnessed anything like that which erupted in the orbit of that accursed dead world. The handful of fighter craft covering the flagship fought an unequal battle with the unholy enemy's ever-swelling hordes. Sacrificing themselves, the servants of House von Valancius cleared the way for their master, just as they had done in days of old.

I have seen my fair share of battles, but never before have I witnessed anything like that which erupted in the orbit of that accursed dead world. The handful of fighter craft covering the flagship fought an outmatched battle with the unholy enemy's ever-swelling hordes. Yet, sacrificing themselves, the servants of House von Valancius cleared the way for their master, just as they did in days of old.

I have seen my fair share of battles, but never before have I witnessed anything like that which erupted in the orbit of that accursed dead world. The fleet of the von Valancius dynasty, covering the flagship, fought an unequal battle with the ever-increasing hordes of the unholy enemy. Sacrificing themselves, the servants of the von Valancius dynasty opened a way for their master, just as they had done in days of old.

I have seen my fair share of battles, but never before have I witnessed anything like that which erupted in the orbit of that accursed dead world. The handful of fighter craft covering the flagship fought an unequal battle with the unholy enemy's ever-swelling hordes. Sacrificing themselves, the servants of House von Valancius cleared the way for their master, just as they had done in days of old.

I have seen my fair share of battles, but never before have I witnessed anything like that which erupted in the orbit of that accursed dead world. The handful of fighter craft covering the flagship fought an outmatched battle with the unholy enemy's ever-swelling hordes. Yet, sacrificing themselves, the servants of House von Valancius cleared the way for their master, just as they did in days of old.

languages.text: 我也算身经百战，却从未见过这般光景——那场战斗爆发于受诅咒的死寂世界轨道上。掩护旗舰的寥寥几架战机，与亵渎之敌那不断膨胀的机群展开血战，完全是以寡敌众。最终，冯·瓦兰修斯家族的忠仆们牺牲自己，为主君扫清了道路，一如既往。
languages.original_text: I have seen my fair share of battles, but never before have I witnessed anything like that which erupted in the orbit of that accursed dead world. The handful of fighter craft covering the flagship fought an outmatched battle with the unholy enemy's ever-swelling hordes. Yet, sacrificing themselves, the servants of House von Valancius cleared the way for their master, just as they did in days of old.

traits.locale_text: 我也算身经百战，却从未见过这般光景——那场战斗爆发于受诅咒的死寂世界轨道上。掩护旗舰的寥寥几架战机，与亵渎之敌那不断膨胀的机群展开血战，完全是以寡敌众。最终，冯·瓦兰修斯家族的忠仆们牺牲自己，为主君扫清了道路，一如既往。

languages.text: De entre todas las batallas que he podido presenciar, ninguna se asemeja a la ocurrida en la órbita de ese condenado mundo muerto. El puñado de cazas que cubría a la nave insignia luchó una batalla desesperada contra las siempre crecientes hordas de nuestro blasfemo enemigo. Sin embargo, los sirvientes de la casa von Valancius se sacrificaron para abrirle el camino a su am{mf|o|a}, siguiendo el ejemplo de sus antepasados.
languages.original_text: I have seen my fair share of battles, but never before have I witnessed anything like that which erupted in the orbit of that accursed dead world. The handful of fighter craft covering the flagship fought an outmatched battle with the unholy enemy's ever-swelling hordes. Yet, sacrificing themselves, the servants of House von Valancius cleared the way for their master, just as they did in days of old.

traits.locale_text: De entre todas las batallas que he podido presenciar, ninguna se asemeja a la ocurrida en la órbita de ese condenado mundo muerto. El puñado de cazas que cubría a la nave insignia luchó una batalla desesperada contra las siempre crecientes hordas de nuestro blasfemo enemigo. Sin embargo, los sirvientes de la casa von Valancius se sacrificaron para abrirle el camino a su am{mf|o|a}, siguiendo el ejemplo de sus antepasados.

languages.text: Bien qu'ayant été témoin de mon lot de batailles, je n'avais encore jamais vu une formation comme celle qui fit irruption dans l'orbite de ce satané monde mort. Quelques chasseurs de la dynastie von Valancius, protégeant leur vaisseau amiral, se lancèrent dans un combat inégal contre les hordes toujours plus nombreuses d'un adversaire impie. Dans un immense sacrifice, et comme ils l'avaient souvent fait par le passé, les serviteurs de la noble maison ouvrirent le passage pour leur maître.
languages.original_text: I have seen my fair share of battles, but never before have I witnessed anything like that which erupted in the orbit of that accursed dead world. The handful of fighter craft covering the flagship fought an outmatched battle with the unholy enemy's ever-swelling hordes. Yet, sacrificing themselves, the servants of House von Valancius cleared the way for their master, just as they did in days of old.

traits.locale_text: Bien qu'ayant été témoin de mon lot de batailles, je n'avais encore jamais vu une formation comme celle qui fit irruption dans l'orbite de ce satané monde mort. Quelques chasseurs de la dynastie von Valancius, protégeant leur vaisseau amiral, se lancèrent dans un combat inégal contre les hordes toujours plus nombreuses d'un adversaire impie. Dans un immense sacrifice, et comme ils l'avaient souvent fait par le passé, les serviteurs de la noble maison ouvrirent le passage pour leur maître.

languages.text: Pek çok savaşa tanık oldum ama o lanetli ölü dünyanın yörüngesinde patlak verenki gibisine daha önce hiç şahit olmamıştım. Sancak gemisini koruyan bir avuç avcı uçağı, o iğrenç düşmanın giderek büyüyen ordularına karşı orantısız bir savaşa girdi. Yine de von Valancius Hanesi'nin hizmetkârları, kendilerini feda ederek tıpkı eski günlerde olduğu gibi efendilerine yolu açtı.
languages.original_text: I have seen my fair share of battles, but never before have I witnessed anything like that which erupted in the orbit of that accursed dead world. The handful of fighter craft covering the flagship fought an outmatched battle with the unholy enemy's ever-swelling hordes. Yet, sacrificing themselves, the servants of House von Valancius cleared the way for their master, just as they did in days of old.

traits.locale_text: Pek çok savaşa tanık oldum ama o lanetli ölü dünyanın yörüngesinde patlak verenki gibisine daha önce hiç şahit olmamıştım. Sancak gemisini koruyan bir avuç avcı uçağı, o iğrenç düşmanın giderek büyüyen ordularına karşı orantısız bir savaşa girdi. Yine de von Valancius Hanesi'nin hizmetkârları, kendilerini feda ederek tıpkı eski günlerde olduğu gibi efendilerine yolu açtı.

languages.text: Ich habe schon so manche Schlacht erlebt, aber was sich da in den Orbit dieser toten Welt erhob, hatte ich noch nie gesehen. Die wenigen Jäger, die das Flaggschiff beschützten lieferten sich eine aussichtslose Schlacht mit den anschwellenden Horden des unheiligen Feindes. Indem sie sich selbst opferten, eröffneten die Diener des Hauses von Valancius ihrem Meister allerdings einen Weg, wie sie es vor langer Zeit schon einmal getan hatten.
languages.original_text: I have seen my fair share of battles, but never before have I witnessed anything like that which erupted in the orbit of that accursed dead world. The handful of fighter craft covering the flagship fought an outmatched battle with the unholy enemy's ever-swelling hordes. Yet, sacrificing themselves, the servants of House von Valancius cleared the way for their master, just as they did in days of old.

traits.locale_text: Ich habe schon so manche Schlacht erlebt, aber was sich da in den Orbit dieser toten Welt erhob, hatte ich noch nie gesehen. Die wenigen Jäger, die das Flaggschiff beschützten lieferten sich eine aussichtslose Schlacht mit den anschwellenden Horden des unheiligen Feindes. Indem sie sich selbst opferten, eröffneten die Diener des Hauses von Valancius ihrem Meister allerdings einen Weg, wie sie es vor langer Zeit schon einmal getan hatten.

languages.text: 私は数々の戦いを経験してきましたが、この呪われた死の世界の軌道で起きたような戦いは見たことがありません。フォン・ヴァランキウス家の艦隊は旗艦を護り、増え続ける邪悪な敵の群れと不釣り合いの戦いを繰り広げました。フォン・ヴァランキウス家の家臣たちは自らの命を犠牲にして、古くから続く伝統のように、主のために道を切り開きました。
languages.original_text: I have seen my fair share of battles, but never before have I witnessed anything like that which erupted in the orbit of that accursed dead world. The fleet of the von Valancius dynasty, covering the flagship, fought an unequal battle with the ever-increasing hordes of the unholy enemy. Sacrificing themselves, the servants of the von Valancius dynasty opened a way for their master, just as they had done in days of old.

traits.locale_text: 私は数々の戦いを経験してきましたが、この呪われた死の世界の軌道で起きたような戦いは見たことがありません。フォン・ヴァランキウス家の艦隊は旗艦を護り、増え続ける邪悪な敵の群れと不釣り合いの戦いを繰り広げました。フォン・ヴァランキウス家の家臣たちは自らの命を犠牲にして、古くから続く伝統のように、主のために道を切り開きました。
